_comment: Immortal Court (仙庭) — opulent central highlands of the Immortal Astral Continent where ruling immortals dwell in sky-piercing palaces. Golden aura, dense spirit energy. Cultivators of the highest realm congregate here. Stand-in spawns: witch=rogue cultivators, horse/parrot/allay=immortal attendants. Dense gold and diamond ores represent the wealth of immortal courts. Plains village structures stand in for immortal cities until custom NBT palaces are added. Prime Directive: the Court exists objectively; its opulence is not a perception effect. Mortals caught here without cultivation die from the spirit pressure.
